result.stdout:
Description:
  Delta Build — incremental CI build tool

Usage:
  Meziantou.DeltaBuild [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  generate  Generate a subset solution/build file for incremental CI builds

commands.payload:
Description:
  Delta Build — incremental CI build tool

Usage:
  Meziantou.DeltaBuild [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  generate  Generate a subset solution/build file for incremental CI builds

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate a subset solution/build file for incremental CI builds

Usage:
  Meziantou.DeltaBuild generate [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)                                 Path to the input file (SLN, SLNX, Traversal SDK, or single project file)
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)                               Path for the output file (SLN, SLNX, or Traversal SDK). Format is inferred from extension.
  -r, --repository <repository>                                  Path to the git repository (default: current directory) [default: .]
  --head-commit <head-commit>                                    The head commit SHA (default: HEAD)
  --base-commit <base-commit>                                    The base commit SHA (default: auto-detected via merge-base)
  --base-branch <base-branch>                                    The base branch for merge-base detection (default: auto-detected from GitHub Actions PR context or remote)
  --working-tree                                                 Compare the base commit against the current working directory instead of a commit. Includes staged, unstaged, and untracked files. When set, --head-commit is ignored.
  --include <include>                                            Glob patterns to filter which projects to consider (repeatable)
  --full-rebuild-trigger <full-rebuild-trigger>                  Glob patterns for files that trigger a full rebuild of ALL projects (replaces defaults when provided, repeatable)
  --hierarchical-rebuild-trigger <hierarchical-rebuild-trigger>  Glob patterns for files that trigger a rebuild of projects in the same folder hierarchy (replaces defaults when provided, repeatable). Default: **/global.json, **/nuget.config, **/.editorconfig
  --engine <MSBuild|RoslynWorkspace|StaticGraph>                 The analysis engine to use: MSBuild (default), RoslynWorkspace (uses Roslyn, more compatible), or StaticGraph (passes input file directly to MSBuild Static Graph API) [default: MSBuild]
  --traversal-before-import <traversal-before-import>            Path of the import added before the ProjectReference items in the generated Traversal SDK file (default: <output-name>.before.proj)
  --traversal-sdk-version <traversal-sdk-version>                Optional version appended to the Traversal SDK in generated Traversal files (for example: Microsoft.Build.Traversal/4.1.82). When omitted, no version suffix is added.
  --traversal-after-import <traversal-after-import>              Path of the import added after the ProjectReference items in the generated Traversal SDK file (default: <output-name>.after.proj)
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Generate a subset solution/build file for incremental CI builds

Usage:
  Meziantou.DeltaBuild generate [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)                                 Path to the input file (SLN, SLNX, Traversal SDK, or single project file)
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)                               Path for the output file (SLN, SLNX, or Traversal SDK). Format is inferred from extension.
  -r, --repository <repository>                                  Path to the git repository (default: current directory) [default: .]
  --head-commit <head-commit>                                    The head commit SHA (default: HEAD)
  --base-commit <base-commit>                                    The base commit SHA (default: auto-detected via merge-base)
  --base-branch <base-branch>                                    The base branch for merge-base detection (default: auto-detected from GitHub Actions PR context or remote)
  --working-tree                                                 Compare the base commit against the current working directory instead of a commit. Includes staged, unstaged, and untracked files. When set, --head-commit is ignored.
  --include <include>                                            Glob patterns to filter which projects to consider (repeatable)
  --full-rebuild-trigger <full-rebuild-trigger>                  Glob patterns for files that trigger a full rebuild of ALL projects (replaces defaults when provided, repeatable)
  --hierarchical-rebuild-trigger <hierarchical-rebuild-trigger>  Glob patterns for files that trigger a rebuild of projects in the same folder hierarchy (replaces defaults when provided, repeatable). Default: **/global.json, **/nuget.config, **/.editorconfig
  --engine <MSBuild|RoslynWorkspace|StaticGraph>                 The analysis engine to use: MSBuild (default), RoslynWorkspace (uses Roslyn, more compatible), or StaticGraph (passes input file directly to MSBuild Static Graph API) [default: MSBuild]
  --traversal-before-import <traversal-before-import>            Path of the import added before the ProjectReference items in the generated Traversal SDK file (default: <output-name>.before.proj)
  --traversal-sdk-version <traversal-sdk-version>                Optional version appended to the Traversal SDK in generated Traversal files (for example: Microsoft.Build.Traversal/4.1.82). When omitted, no version suffix is added.
  --traversal-after-import <traversal-after-import>              Path of the import added after the ProjectReference items in the generated Traversal SDK file (default: <output-name>.after.proj)
  -?, -h, --help                                                 Show help and usage information
